prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mazda B3-MI (1.3L DOHC 16V, 97-105 PS stock) with a custom-built turbo kit using a Garrett GT1544 turbocharger, HKS 264° camshafts, and a Tomei 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold for optimized spool and flow. Pair with a Haltech Elite 1500 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping, targeting 180-200 PS at 7,500 RPM with 12 psi of boost.

Full chassis reinforcement using a Cusco bolt-in 4-point roll cage (PN: 602 541 2) and Mazdaspeed-specific strut tower bars (front and rear) to eliminate flex. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Revue’s 900kg weight), Eibach Pro-Kit springs, and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (PN: SPF0115-K) for sharper turn-in.

Drivetrain upgrades including a Mazda MX-5 NA (BP-ZE) 6-speed manual transmission swap with a Fidanza lightweight flywheel (PN: 160151) and a Spec Stage 3+ clutch (PN: SSP301). Final drive ratio adjusted to 4.30:1 via a Mazda 323 GTX (BFMR) differential for quicker acceleration, paired with Nismo 5-speed synchros for durability.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (PN: RB-W01) adapted for the Revue’s unique body lines, including widened fenders (20mm per side), a carbon fiber front splitter, and a ducktail spoiler for rear downforce. Custom front bumper lip from Garage Vary for aggressive stance and improved airflow to the intercooler.

Enkei PF07 wheels (15x8 +25 offset) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (195/50R15) for maximum grip, paired with DBA 4000 Series rotors and Project Mu B-Spec brake pads (PN: PMU801) for fade-resistant stopping power. Wheel spacers (15mm hubcentric) from 5Zigen to fill the arches.

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III seats (PN: Z3-CFRP) mounted on custom brackets to retain the Revue’s original seatbelt anchors. Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) with a NRG quick-release hub, and a full gauge pod from Defi (PN: DF13001) featuring boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR readouts. Custom door cards with Alcantara inserts and red stitching from AutoExe.
